proposal.summary: Implement a focused event runtime system that executes EventDefinition effects triggered by interactables and puzzles.
out_of_scope: Full sound mixing and ambience system
Room art mutation and spawned visual object presentation

user_decisions.decision: Proceed through Harness steps automatically and treat the recurring next-step prompt as approval to continue approved-for-implementation units.

decision_log.reason: phases/index.json has no active or blocked phase and NEXT_ACTION.md recommends EventRuntimeSystem.

current_state: Completed. EventRuntimeSystem executes defined Stage 1 events from interactables and puzzles, with minimal event effects seeded.
resume_instructions: This phase is complete. Next, start one new Harness unit for SoundRuntimeSystem only if phases/index.json has no in_progress or blocked phase.
next_action: Start SoundRuntimeSystem for ambience, UI SFX, puzzle feedback, and event audio routing.
